title: Plan import sources: section roadmaps and GitHub issues

acceptance_criteria.text: import-plan parses section-based roadmap/backlog files without checkboxes: `##` headings (Now/Next/Later/Done/Blocked) classify the lifecycle of their bullets.
import-plan can import GitHub issues (opt-in --issues, best-effort via gh): open -> active, closed -> completed/waived; safe no-op when gh or a remote is absent.
